scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:frontend && npm run build:desktop && npm run build:backend
scripts.dev: npm run build:backend:dev && concurrently -n frontend,desktop -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @sam/frontend" "npm run dev:desktop"
scripts.dist: npm run build && npm run dist -w @sam/desktop
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @sam/frontend && npm run lint -w @sam/desktop && npm run lint -w @sam/shared
scripts.sort: npx sort-package-json && npm exec -ws -- npx sort-package-json
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @sam/shared && npm run typecheck -w @sam/frontend && npm run typecheck -w @sam/desktop
